title: About
text: This site is built with Quarto and hosted on GitHub Pages.

title: About

About This Site
Add your own content here — who you are, what the project is, or anything else you’d like to share.

title: Welcome
text:
This is a simple website built with Quarto and deployed via GitHub Pages.


Edit this file (index.qmd) to update the home page. Add new .qmd files and list them in _quarto.yml to create more pages.




Write content in Markdown or R/Python code blocks
Built-in syntax highlighting
Responsive layout via Bootstrap
